engine.name: NDCH DreamForge Engine
engine.description: Production engine for NDCH (Determine Champions) Instagram Reels. ElevenLabs TTS (DR_NKRUMAH voice) → Runway Gen-4 → FFmpeg merge → subtitle burn-in → GitHub Release.

style_1_fractal.label: NDCH Brutalist CAD
style_1_fractal.description: Hard-geometry brutalist aesthetic. Monolithic containment structures rendered in 4-color system: void #1A1A1A / telemetry #C6A94F / historical_code #F5F2EB / interference #DC143C. Single dominant camera vector per clip. No organic morphing, no dissolves, no lens flares. Central vertical corridor is subtitle-safe sacred space.
style_1_fractal.base_prompt: 9:16 vertical cinematic. QUOTE — brutalist concrete containment chamber, flat matte black #1A1A1A surfaces, bone-white #F5F2EB human silhouette centered in subtitle corridor, geometric gold #C6A94F stress lines on structure, crimson #DC143C pressure at frame edges. Hard-geometry CAD aesthetic, no organic morphing, single dominant camera vector, no text overlays.

style_2_identity.label: Identity & Shadow Self
style_2_identity.description: Dark cinematic portraiture with dramatic lighting, silhouettes, and intense personal narrative energy.
style_2_identity.base_prompt: Create a cinematic reel about QUOTE — dark dramatic portraiture, silhouette against golden light, slow motion fabric and dust particles, intense personal transformation aesthetic, 4K, no text overlays.
style_2_identity.camera_notes: slow push-in on face, rack focus, handheld feel

style_3_hud.label: HUD Neural Grid
style_3_hud.description: Futuristic HUD-style overlays, neural network grids, dark sci-fi aesthetic with electric blue and gold.
style_3_hud.base_prompt: Create a futuristic reel about QUOTE — HUD data overlays, neural network grid lines, electric blue and gold neon accents, dark background, AI aesthetic, cinematic motion, 4K, no readable text.
style_3_hud.camera_notes: digital zoom, glitch transitions, parallax layers

style_4_forge.label: Forge & Ember
style_4_forge.description: Molten metal close-ups, falling sparks against deep black, liquid gold solidifying. The raw material under pressure becoming something permanent.
style_4_forge.base_prompt: Create a dramatic reel about QUOTE — extreme close-up of glowing molten metal and cascading sparks against pure black, liquid gold solidifying into form, slow motion ember drift, hands gripping hammer, cinematic 4K, no text overlays.
style_4_forge.camera_notes: extreme macro close-up, ultra-slow motion sparks, tight forge detail shots

style_5_blueprint.label: Blueprint Architect
style_5_blueprint.description: Precise gold technical line drawings on deep black — architectural blueprints for human systems. Frameworks, diagrams, deliberate construction.
style_5_blueprint.base_prompt: Create a reel about QUOTE — precise gold architectural blueprint lines drawing themselves on deep black, geometric forms constructing from nothing, elegant technical diagrams morphing in sequence, drafting instruments, cinematic 4K, no readable text.
style_5_blueprint.camera_notes: slow reveal zoom on constructing line elements, lines drawing in real time, subtitle-safe center

style_6_obsidian.label: Obsidian Mirror
style_6_obsidian.description: Deep reflective black surfaces, figures facing their reflection, confrontational stillness. Bone-white light, crimson shadow accents.
style_6_obsidian.base_prompt: Create a cinematic reel about QUOTE — polished obsidian and dark mirror surfaces, a lone figure standing before their distorted reflection, bone-white light source, deep crimson shadow accents, meditative confrontational stillness, 4K, no text overlays.
style_6_obsidian.camera_notes: slow pull-back reveal, symmetrical framing, mirror-axis composition

style_7_threshold.label: Threshold Guardian
style_7_threshold.description: Liminal architecture and shadow guardian figures. Absolute black void, towering geometric gateways, shadow forms backlit by deep gold aperture light, crimson boundary traces, bone-white particle scatter. The pressure of the between-space — threshold as identity test.
style_7_threshold.base_prompt: Create a cinematic reel about QUOTE — absolute black (#1A1A1A) void, a towering geometric gateway built from compressed architectural geometry, a dense shadow figure standing before it backlit by deep gold (#C6A94F) aperture light pulsing from within the gateway, crimson (#DC143C) boundary traces marking the figure's perimeter with surgical precision, bone-white (#F5F2EB) particle scatter drifting upward throughout, confrontational liminal stillness, slow center-frame hold, sequence arc: figure screens, fractures, dissolves, gold aperture floods frame, 4K vertical, no text overlays.
style_7_threshold.camera_notes: fixed center-frame hold, slow deliberate forward push on confrontation, gold aperture flood on final phase

style_selection_logic.description: Rules evaluated in priority order. First keyword match wins. Default triggers when no keywords match.

duration_strategy.rationale: 45s is the NDCH gold standard — accommodates the 6-beat arc (hook/entrapment/strain/breakaway/supremacy/mobius_close) with the Möbius loop seam at the end.
